_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of the use of sub-netting tools.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data and AI requirements, evaluating trade-offs between performance, maintainability, team capability, ecosystem maturity, and cost.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI TF domain. TF-A-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-K-011 (DA, cosine: 0.313), TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.299).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.6/10 (raw 0.263). Shared vocabulary: [tools]. DCWF-only terms [knowledge, netting, sub, use] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, ai, appropriate, capability, cost, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.867 (P=0.891, R=0.845). P exceeds R by 0.046 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 25 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Knowledge of the use of sub-netting tools." and "Ability to select appropriate technical tools, languages, and platforms for data" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.343 > STS 0.263 (gap +0.080). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [tools] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.3%. Shared tokens: [tools]. DCWF-only: [knowledge, netting, sub, use]. WIDAI-only: [ability, ai, appropriate, capability, cost, data].
